summary: Backend-only testing of Data Retention Policy feature completed. All 10 tests passed. The feature implements: 1) GET /api/structured-tests/{test_id}/results/{student_id} returns 'retained_only' field (False for recent tests, will be True when details expire after 2 months), 2) DELETE /api/structured-tests/cleanup/expired admin-only endpoint returns {'message': 'Retention policy applied', 'deleted': 0}, 3) Background task 'retention_cleanup_task' confirmed started in logs.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing Hindi AI test (7f96e624-d12c-4cbf-9649-921d5ca7d6ce) with Krutika's submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data retention feature tested. Key findings: 1) retained_only field correctly returns False for recent tests (< 60 days), 2) cleanup endpoint is admin-only (returns 403 for students/teachers), 3) background task logs confirm '📋 Data retention cleanup task started (runs every 6 hours)', 4) Since no records have expired yet (all created recently), cleanup returns deleted=0. To test expired behavior, would need to manually set expires_at in database to past date.

backend_tests.TestDataRetentionResultsAPI::test_result: PASSED - total_score, max_score, percentage, improvement_summary all present

background_task_verification.log_message: 📋 Data retention cleanup task started (runs every 6 hours)
